name: Soy Burgers
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Toasted sesame or sunflower seeds ground
recipeInstructions:
1. SOAK soybeans overnight. Drain and dry.
2. COARSELY CHOP the soybeans.
3. SAUTÉ onions and mix with remaining ingredients.
4. SHAPE into patties and cook on a griddle or in a skillet.
OR BAKE patties at 350°F for 20 minutes.
5. TO KEEP PATTIES FROM STICKING, sprinkle the griddle or baking dish with sesame seeds.
6. OR FREEZE on a cookie sheet and then store in the freezer. Take from the freezer when ready to use.
